title: PlayerHeads
description: Get a head of your victim
body:
PlayerHeads - Drop Player Heads on Deaths

PlayerHeads is a plugin that enhances your server's gameplay by adding a fun little feature - dropping player heads upon player deaths.

Features:
- Automatic player head drops upon player deaths
- Works for all types of player deaths, including PvP and PvE encounters
- Compatible with Spigot-based servers

How to Use:
Simply install PlayerHeads on your server, and it will work out of the box. No configurations or additional setup required.
